items.title: hololive’s Houshou Marine is getting her own line of instant ramen
items.author: Charlotte Davis
items.content: A new collaboration has been announced between the Japanese supermarket chain Ito-Yokado and the popular VTuber, Houshou Marine, from the group hololive.

items.title: hololive’s Ao Hiodoshi announces graduation following medical hiatus
items.author: Charlotte Davis
items.content: The VTuber agency Cover Corporation has announced that Ao Hiodoshi, a member of the group "hololive DEV_IS," will be graduating from her activities.

items.title: New official hololive fan club offers early access to concert tickets and exclusive merch
items.author: James Richardson
items.content: Cover Corporation has announced the launch of a new, official fan club for the popular VTuber group hololive.

items.title: hololive x Street Fighter 6 collab continues as CAPCOM reveals second wave of exclusive goods
items.author: James Richardson
items.content: The second wave of the collaboration between the hit fighting game Street Fighter 6 and VTuber group hololive has been revealed by CAPCOM.

items.title: hololive VTuber Houshou Marine’s PUBG MOBILE collab event gets underway
items.author: James Richardson
items.content: A new in-game collaboration with popular VTuber Houshou Marine has begun in the globally popular battle royale game PUBG MOBILE.

items.title: hololive New Year’s Eve countdown concert to return for 2025
items.author: Charlotte Davis
items.content: The concert is a massive, multi-hour music and variety special that brings together the talents from all of the different branches of the hololive Production agency.

items.title: hololive’s Usada Pekora issues statement as graduation rumors spread
items.author: Charlotte Davis
items.content: The popular VTuber Usada Pekora, who is affiliated with the group hololive, has issued an official statement regarding rumors that she is planning to "graduate," or retire from her activities.
